name: bolt-ue
description: Type definitions for bolt UE plugin authoring
author: Jabriel <jabrielah@outlook.com>

scripts.build:types: bunx dts-bundle-generator --no-banner --project tsconfig.json -o bolt.d.ts src/plugin-api.ts && bun run scripts/wrap-dts.ts bolt.d.ts
scripts.build:win: bun run build:types && bun run scripts/build-binary.ts bun-windows-x64 build/bolt-win-x64.exe && cp bolt.d.ts build/bolt.d.ts
scripts.build:mac: bun run build:types && bun run scripts/build-binary.ts bun-darwin-arm64 build/bolt-mac-arm64 && cp bolt.d.ts build/bolt.d.ts
scripts.build:all: bun run build:win && bun run build:mac
